headline: What Arista Networks Stock's Balance Sheet Revealed Before the AI Boom
summary: Long before the stock took off, the company's orders for future parts and its backlog of unbooked sales were telling a powerful story about the coming AI demand.

headline: KeyBanc Raises PT on Arista Networks (ANET) Stock
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the Most Promising AI Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 2 Years. On June 18, KeyBanc analyst Brandon Nispel lifted the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $200 from $178 and maintained an “Overweight” rating on the shares.
